label: Harvest Pak
blurb: Farming, Agriculture & Rural Small Business. Yield logistics, equipment uptime, and direct-to-consumer sales.

skills.label: Ag Exemption Tax Tagger
skills.method: Scans hardware store and feed mill receipts, tagging items that qualify for agricultural sales-tax exemptions for the CPA.
trigger_examples: ensures farmers don't overpay the irs

skills.label: Farmers Market Permit Renewer
skills.method: Tracks the expiration dates of the farm's scale certifications, health department permits, and liability insurance, auto-generating the renewal paperwork.
trigger_examples: keeps the farm legally allowed to sell at weekend markets

skills.label: Tractor Pto Maintenance Logger
skills.method: Logs the hours the Power Take-Off (PTO) shaft has been running from the John Deere app, scheduling a greasing and belt check before harvest season.
trigger_examples: prevents catastrophic equipment failure when time is money

skills.label: Farm Stand Honor Box Reconciler
skills.method: Compares the Venmo/cash collected at an unstaffed roadside vegetable stand against the missing inventory to track local theft/shrinkage rates.
trigger_examples: digitizes the oldest retail model on earth

skills.label: Fertilizer Spread Rate Calculator
skills.method: Takes the soil test results (N-P-K) and the acreage, calculating the exact spreader calibration setting needed to avoid burning the crops or wasting expensive chemicals.

skills.label: Csa Box Harvest Balancer
skills.method: Takes the list of 50 subscribed families, calculates the exact pounds of tomatoes/kale available this week, and generates the packing list for each Community Supported Agriculture box.

skills.label: Greenhouse Frost Alarm Escalator
skills.method: Monitors greenhouse IoT thermometers; if the heater fails and temps drop to 34°F at 2 AM, it triggers an alarm that overrides the farmer's phone's "Do Not Disturb" mode.
trigger_examples: saves tens of thousands of dollars in frozen seedlings

skills.label: Livestock Auction Price Scraper
skills.method: Scrapes regional sale barn reports daily, texting the rancher the current price per hundredweight (cwt) for feeder steers so they know exactly when to sell.

skills.label: Feed Silo Depletion Predictor
skills.method: Calculates the daily consumption rate of 500 pigs, automatically calling the local feed mill to deliver another 3 tons two days before the silo goes empty.
trigger_examples: prevents animal starvation and emergency delivery fees

skills.label: Equine Farrier Schedule Router
skills.method: Tracks the 6-week horseshoeing cycle for 40 horses across 5 different boarding barns, generating a geographic driving route for the blacksmith.
trigger_examples: maximizes a rural tradesman's billable hours
